headline: FedEx (FDX) Completes Freight Spin Off As New Company Starts Trading
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) has completed the spin-off of its FedEx Freight unit into a separate, publicly traded company. The newly independent FedEx Freight has begun trading and reported its first quarterly results as a standalone business. This transaction reshapes FedEx's business structure by separating its less-than-truckload operations from its express and ground segments. For you as an investor, this move changes how FedEx is structured and how its different lines of business are exposed to...
